posts.author: Khudgins1 (Karen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When searching the archives, there is no way to see where automated subitems are coming from. Need to be able to see the ITEM from which the subitem was automated. otherwise, you have to unarchive each one to find the RIGHT one.

What are you trying to achieve

searching for the correct subitem in the archives specific to a main item
